notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; traceable source extracts are used when DeepSeek is unavailable.

articles.title: 西南地区及长江中下游有较强降雨
articles.highlight: 预计未来三天，较强降雨落区仍主要在云南、广西至长江中下游一带
articles.summary: 文章报道中央气象台发布强对流天气蓝色预警和暴雨蓝色预警，未来三天西南地区及长江中下游将有大雨或暴雨，局地大暴雨。该信息对公众出行和防灾具有重要指导意义。
articles.sourceExcerpt: 人民网北京7月19日电 (记者欧阳易佳)7月19日10时，中央气象台继续发布强对流天气蓝色预警和暴雨蓝色预警。预计未来三天，较强降雨落区仍主要在云南、广西至长江中下游一带，上述大部地区将有大雨或暴雨，局地有大暴雨。

zh.title: 西南地区及长江中下游有较强降雨

zh.summary: 文章报道中央气象台发布强对流天气蓝色预警和暴雨蓝色预警，未来三天西南地区及长江中下游将有大雨或暴雨，局地大暴雨。该信息对公众出行和防灾具有重要指导意义。

en.highlight: Over the next three days, heavy rainfall will mainly affect Yunnan, Guangxi, and the middle-lower Yangtze region.
en.summary: The article reports that the Central Meteorological Observatory has issued blue warnings for severe convective weather and heavy rain. In the next three days, parts of Southwest China and the middle-lower Yangtze will experience heavy rain or storms, with local downpours. This information is crucial for public travel and disaster prevention.
en.title: Heavy Rainfall Expected in Southwest China and Middle-Lower Yangtze

articles.title: 荆风楚韵跃动花莲 湖北演艺团体亮相台湾少数民族丰年节
articles.highlight: 湖北歌唱家杨娟在花莲少数民族文化馆一亮相即获热烈掌声。
articles.summary: 湖北演艺团体在台湾花莲少数民族丰年节上表演，歌唱家杨娟以民歌《妹娃要过河》开场，受到当地观众热烈欢迎。该活动展示了荆楚文化与台湾少数民族文化的交流互动。
articles.failureAnalysis: 本文为文化交流报道，无失败分析必要。
articles.sourceExcerpt: 中新社台湾花莲7月19日电 (记者 朱贺)“妹娃要过河，哪个来推我嘛？花莲的乡亲们，大家好！”伴随一声嘹亮清丽的问好，头戴银饰、身穿少数民族服饰的湖北歌唱家杨娟行至台湾花莲一处少数民族文化馆演艺厅中央，甫一亮相即获热烈掌声。

en.highlight: Hubei singer Yang Juan received warm applause upon her appearance at an indigenous cultural center in Hualien, Taiwan.
en.summary: A Hubei performance group performed at Taiwan's indigenous harvest festival in Hualien. Singer Yang Juan opened with a folk song and was warmly welcomed by the local audience. The event showcased cultural exchange between Hubei and Taiwan's indigenous communities.
en.failureAnalysis: This is a cultural exchange report; no failure analysis is necessary.
en.title: Hubei Performance Group Appears at Taiwan Indigenous Harvest Festival in Hualien

articles.title: 第27届青洽会实现三重提质 签约项目108个总投资额758亿元
articles.highlight: 本届青洽会招商签约实现大项目、新赛道、长链条三重提质，累计签约项目108个，总投资额758亿元。
articles.summary: 第27届中国·青海绿色发展投资贸易洽谈会成果发布，签约项目达108个，总投资额758亿元，实现了大项目、新赛道、长链条的三重提质。这显示了青海在绿色发展领域的招商引资成效显著，值得关注。
articles.failureAnalysis: 展会成果显著，但需关注后续项目落地率和实际投资到位情况，确保签约转化为实际经济增长。
articles.sourceExcerpt: 中新网西宁7月19日电 (记者 孙睿)7月19日，第27届中国·青海绿色发展投资贸易洽谈会(简称：青洽会)成果发布会在西宁举行。青海省政府副秘书长肖向东表示，本届青洽会招商签约实现大项目、新赛道、长链条三重提质，全大会累计签约项目108个，总投资额758亿元。

zh.title: 第27届青洽会签约项目108个 总投资758亿元

zh.summary: 第27届中国·青海绿色发展投资贸易洽谈会成果发布，签约项目达108个，总投资额758亿元，实现了大项目、新赛道、长链条的三重提质。这显示了青海在绿色发展领域的招商引资成效显著，值得关注。
zh.failureAnalysis: 展会成果显著，但需关注后续项目落地率和实际投资到位情况，确保签约转化为实际经济增长。

en.highlight: This year's fair achieved triple quality improvements in large projects, new tracks, and long chains, signing 108 projects with a total investment of 75.8 billion yuan.
en.summary: The 27th China·Qinghai Green Development Investment and Trade Fair announced results, signing 108 projects worth 75.8 billion yuan, achieving triple improvements in scale, innovation, and industrial chain. It highlights Qinghai's success in attracting green investment.
en.failureAnalysis: The fair's achievements are notable, but attention should be paid to project implementation and actual capital inflow to ensure signed projects translate into real economic growth.
en.title: The 27th Qinghai Green Development Investment and Trade Fair Signs 108 Projects with Total Investment of 75.8 Billion Yuan

articles.title: Chinese firm seeks compensation over British Steel nationalisation
articles.highlight: 敬业集团表示将通过法律手段维权到底，因英国政府将英国钢铁公司国有化。
articles.summary: 文章报道了中国敬业集团因英国政府将英国钢铁公司国有化而计划采取法律行动寻求赔偿。这对于关注国际商业纠纷和中英投资关系的读者具有参考价值。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：跨国企业需警惕目标国政策变动风险，特别是在涉及战略性行业时。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Jingye said it will take action "through legal means to the very end" after the UK government nationalised British Steel.

zh.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：跨国企业需警惕目标国政策变动风险，特别是在涉及战略性行业时。

en.highlight: Jingye said it will take action 'through legal means to the very end' after the UK government nationalised British Steel.
en.summary: The article reports that Chinese company Jingye plans legal action for compensation after the UK government nationalised British Steel. It is worth reading for those interested in international business disputes and China-UK investment relations.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Multinational enterprises must be cautious about policy risks in target countries, especially in strategic industries.
en.title: Chinese firm seeks compensation over British Steel nationalisation

articles.title: 'My buyers dropped their offer by £15,000 the day before exchange': Gazundering and how to avoid it
articles.highlight: 这是一个规模不大但日益严重的问题，房产市场中的“压价”行为让卖家措手不及。
articles.summary: 本文讨论了英国房地产市场中“gazundering”（买家在交换合同前突然降价）的现象，分析了其增长趋势，并提供了卖家保护自己的实用建议。值得阅读以了解如何应对这种突发情况。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：卖家应提前做好心理准备，了解“压价”并非罕见，并在交易过程中保持灵活，例如设定明确的截止日期或要求非可退定金。
articles.sourceExcerpt: It's a small but growing problem in the property market - here's how to protect yourself.

zh.title: “买家在交换合同前一天降价1.5万英镑”：房地产市场中的“压价”现象及应对方法
zh.highlight: 这是一个规模不大但日益严重的问题，房产市场中的“压价”行为让卖家措手不及。
zh.summary: 本文讨论了英国房地产市场中“gazundering”（买家在交换合同前突然降价）的现象，分析了其增长趋势，并提供了卖家保护自己的实用建议。值得阅读以了解如何应对这种突发情况。
zh.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：卖家应提前做好心理准备，了解“压价”并非罕见，并在交易过程中保持灵活，例如设定明确的截止日期或要求非可退定金。

en.highlight: It's a small but growing problem in the property market - here's how to protect yourself.
en.summary: This article discusses the phenomenon of 'gazundering' – buyers reducing their offer just before exchange – which is a small but growing problem in the UK property market. It offers practical advice for sellers on how to protect themselves, making it a useful read for anyone involved in property transactions.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Sellers should mentally prepare for potential gazundering and consider strategies such as setting a deadline for exchange or requesting a non-refundable deposit to mitigate risks.
en.title: 'My buyers dropped their offer by £15,000 the day before exchange': Gazundering and how to avoid it

articles.title: AI Mania Is Eviscerating Global Decision-Making
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: Case study
articles.summary: 文章揭露了AI狂热如何让企业高管们脱离实际，甚至在没有使用AI的情况下制定以AI为中心的战略，而内部质疑者因担心得罪客户或失去合同而选择沉默。这种氛围正在扭曲决策质量，值得警惕。
articles.failureAnalysis: 警惕AI炒作中的虚幻承诺，决策者应基于实际体验和理性分析，而非盲目跟风或迎合客户不切实际的期望。
articles.highlight: 一位高管承认从未使用过ChatGPT等AI工具，却为一家20亿美元营收的公司制定了完全围绕AI的技术战略。
articles.sourceExcerpt: AI Mania Is Eviscerating Global Decision-Making Here's an entertaining perspective from Nik Suresh on the AI mania that is overwhelming the large companies that he consults with. It's crammed with spicy anecdotes from anonymous sources. In one extreme case, I have seen an executive confess that they had never even used ChatGPT or any AI tool in their life, immediately after producing a technical strategy for an organisation with $2B+ in revenue which was entirely centered around AI.

zh.title: AI狂热正在摧毁全球决策机制
zh.highlight: 一位高管承认从未使用过ChatGPT等AI工具，却为一家20亿美元营收的公司制定了完全围绕AI的技术战略。
zh.summary: 文章揭露了AI狂热如何让企业高管们脱离实际，甚至在没有使用AI的情况下制定以AI为中心的战略，而内部质疑者因担心得罪客户或失去合同而选择沉默。这种氛围正在扭曲决策质量，值得警惕。
zh.failureAnalysis: 警惕AI炒作中的虚幻承诺，决策者应基于实际体验和理性分析，而非盲目跟风或迎合客户不切实际的期望。

en.highlight: An executive confessed they had never used ChatGPT or any AI tool, yet produced a technical strategy entirely centered around AI for a $2B+ revenue organization.
en.summary: This article reveals how AI mania is distorting corporate decision-making, with executives making absurd claims without firsthand experience, and dissent being silenced to avoid contract cancellations. A must-read for staying grounded in AI hype.
en.failureAnalysis: Beware of AI hype that prioritizes appearances over substance; decisions should be grounded in actual usage and critical thinking, not customer pressure.
en.title: AI Mania Is Eviscerating Global Decision-Making

articles.title: GammaLabTechnologies/harmonist
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 这是一款GitHub上热门的开源项目，提供轻量级AI代理编排框架，通过机械协议强制确保代理协作的可靠性与可移植性。零运行时依赖的设计使其部署极为简便，适合边缘或资源受限场景，值得关注其在简化多代理系统管理方面的创新。
articles.failureAnalysis: 机械协议强制可能过于僵化，难以适应动态或非结构化的AI任务；186个代理的规模虽大，但实际企业级编排需要更灵活的调度和扩展能力；零依赖虽然简化部署，但功能完整性受限，可能无法满足复杂业务需求。此外，相比LangChain等成熟框架，其生态系统和社区支持较弱，存在被边缘化的风险。
articles.highlight: 便携式AI代理编排，具备机械协议强制执行，支持186个代理，零运行时依赖。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 2398 stars and recent public activity. Description: Portable AI agent orchestration with mechanical protocol enforcement. 186 agents, zero runtime dependencies.

zh.title: 便携式AI代理编排：机械协议强制执行的零依赖方案
zh.highlight: 便携式AI代理编排，具备机械协议强制执行，支持186个代理，零运行时依赖。
zh.summary: 这是一款GitHub上热门的开源项目，提供轻量级AI代理编排框架，通过机械协议强制确保代理协作的可靠性与可移植性。零运行时依赖的设计使其部署极为简便，适合边缘或资源受限场景，值得关注其在简化多代理系统管理方面的创新。
zh.failureAnalysis: 机械协议强制可能过于僵化，难以适应动态或非结构化的AI任务；186个代理的规模虽大，但实际企业级编排需要更灵活的调度和扩展能力；零依赖虽然简化部署，但功能完整性受限，可能无法满足复杂业务需求。此外，相比LangChain等成熟框架，其生态系统和社区支持较弱，存在被边缘化的风险。

en.highlight: Portable AI agent orchestration with mechanical protocol enforcement, supporting 186 agents with zero runtime dependencies.
en.summary: This GitHub repository presents a lightweight orchestration framework for AI agents that enforces mechanical protocols to ensure reliability and portability. With zero runtime dependencies, it simplifies deployment in edge or resource-constrained environments, making it worth reading for those interested in streamlined multi-agent management.
en.failureAnalysis: The rigid mechanical protocol enforcement may hinder adaptability in dynamic tasks, and while supporting 186 agents, it lacks the flexibility and scalability needed for enterprise-grade orchestration. The zero-dependency design limits functionality, and competition from mature frameworks like LangChain poses adoption challenges.
en.title: Portable AI Agent Orchestration with Mechanical Protocol Enforcement and Zero Dependencies

articles.title: anysearch-ai/anysearch-mcp-server
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目提供了一个MCP（Model Context Protocol）服务器，使AI智能体能够通过统一接口实时访问多个搜索引擎，解决信息获取碎片化问题。它降低了集成复杂度，提升了搜索效率，适合需要实时数据检索的AI应用场景。值得关注是因为它简化了多源搜索的工程实现，对构建智能体系统有实际参考价值。
articles.failureAnalysis: 需求端虽存在，但实时搜索API可能带来高昂成本和延迟，影响用户体验。多搜索引擎的合规性和稳定性差异大，维护成本高。作为开源项目，缺乏商业闭环，长期可持续性存疑。此外，可能面临搜索质量、隐私保护等工程约束。
articles.highlight: 为AI智能体提供统一的实时搜索引擎技能
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 1553 stars and recent public activity. Description: Unified real-time search engine skill for AI agents.

zh.title: AnySearch MCP服务器：AI智能体的统一实时搜索引擎技能
zh.highlight: 为AI智能体提供统一的实时搜索引擎技能
zh.summary: 该项目提供了一个MCP（Model Context Protocol）服务器，使AI智能体能够通过统一接口实时访问多个搜索引擎，解决信息获取碎片化问题。它降低了集成复杂度，提升了搜索效率，适合需要实时数据检索的AI应用场景。值得关注是因为它简化了多源搜索的工程实现，对构建智能体系统有实际参考价值。
zh.failureAnalysis: 需求端虽存在，但实时搜索API可能带来高昂成本和延迟，影响用户体验。多搜索引擎的合规性和稳定性差异大，维护成本高。作为开源项目，缺乏商业闭环，长期可持续性存疑。此外，可能面临搜索质量、隐私保护等工程约束。

en.highlight: Unified real-time search engine skill for AI agents.
en.summary: This project provides an MCP server that enables AI agents to query multiple search engines in real time through a unified interface, reducing the complexity of integrating disparate sources. It is worth reading because it addresses the fragmentation of real-time information retrieval in agent systems, offering a practical engineering approach.
en.failureAnalysis: Potential failure from high API costs, latency, and the challenge of maintaining consistent quality across different search engines. As an open-source project without a clear business model, long-term sustainability is uncertain.
en.title: AnySearch MCP Server: Unified Real-Time Search Engine Skill for AI Agents

articles.title: Kaelio/ktx
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: ktx是一个开源项目，通过封装数据库上下文，使Claude Code、Codex等AI代理能够更准确、一致地查询企业分析数据库。该工具解决了AI代理在数据分析中缺乏业务语境和表结构认知的问题，提升了查询准确性和安全性。对于企业级AI数据应用具有实用价值。
articles.failureAnalysis: 项目深度绑定特定AI代理（如Claude Code、Codex），可能限制其适用性和生态扩展。部署需要企业自定义公司上下文，初始配置成本较高且维护负担重。另外，数据安全与权限管理在企业环境中是敏感问题，开源方案可能难以满足严格合规要求，影响规模化采用。
articles.highlight: ktx是面向数据和分析代理的可执行上下文层，让AI代理准确查询分析数据库并携带公司完整上下文
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 1503 stars and recent public activity. Description: ktx is an executable context layer for data and analytics agents 🐙 Allow Claude Code, Codex, or other AI agents to query analytical databases accurately and with full context of your company

zh.title: Kaelio/ktx：为AI分析代理提供可执行上下文层
zh.highlight: ktx是面向数据和分析代理的可执行上下文层，让AI代理准确查询分析数据库并携带公司完整上下文
zh.summary: ktx是一个开源项目，通过封装数据库上下文，使Claude Code、Codex等AI代理能够更准确、一致地查询企业分析数据库。该工具解决了AI代理在数据分析中缺乏业务语境和表结构认知的问题，提升了查询准确性和安全性。对于企业级AI数据应用具有实用价值。
zh.failureAnalysis: 项目深度绑定特定AI代理（如Claude Code、Codex），可能限制其适用性和生态扩展。部署需要企业自定义公司上下文，初始配置成本较高且维护负担重。另外，数据安全与权限管理在企业环境中是敏感问题，开源方案可能难以满足严格合规要求，影响规模化采用。

en.highlight: ktx is an executable context layer for data and analytics agents, allowing AI agents to query analytical databases accurately with full company context.
en.summary: ktx is an open-source project that provides a context layer for AI analytics agents, enabling them to query enterprise databases with accurate business and schema context. It addresses the lack of contextual awareness in AI-driven data analysis, improving query accuracy and security. This practical tool is valuable for enterprise AI data applications.
en.failureAnalysis: The project is tightly coupled with specific AI agents, limiting its broader adoption. Deployment requires customizing company context, which introduces significant upfront configuration and ongoing maintenance. Moreover, data security and compliance concerns in enterprise settings may hinder adoption of an open-source solution.
en.title: Kaelio/ktx: An executable context layer for AI analytics agents
